title: Debug
description: Build a reproducible failure loop, rank falsifiable causes, instrument one variable at a time, fix, and prove the original failure is gone. Use for bugs, broken flows, flaky behavior, and performance regressions.
body: Start by making the failure observable. Do not patch from a hunch. A debugging run is valid only when it reproduces the user-described symptom, narrows the cause with falsifiable evidence, removes temporary probes, and leaves a regression signal or an explicit reason no correct seam exists.
